aiPlus.label: WordBoost AI+
aiPlus.description: Get instant AI-powered English support anytime. Practice your English with a smart AI that helps you understand, correct, and improve your sentences in real-time. One-time purchase, lifetime access.

premium.label: WordBoost Premium
premium.description: Unlock the full WordBoost experience. Get everything you need to learn English faster, including AI support, unlimited access, and a distraction-free experience. Best value for serious learners.

classroom.label: WordBoost Classroom
classroom.description: The ultimate tool for teachers and schools. Easily manage your classroom, assign vocabulary tasks, and track every student's progress from a single dashboard.
